DEFENDANTS YOUSAF MUHAMMAD AND YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT is denied. The punitive damages allegations are sufficient. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077
